# Transcrição: 5. AFFORDABILITY CLOSE - ASSURE YOU

## [00:00 - 00:13]

You just heard, I don't think we can afford to do this. With the financing packages we have available today, I assure you that we will make this affordable and if we can't, I wouldn't ask you to do business with us.
